comment: Flow_AddressResolve (ROADMAP 4a — inspection-address matching). Request-triggered child taking { caseId }. Reads the Case, derives the OUTWARD postcode code from cr1bd_evainspectionaddress with a pure Power-Automate expression (no Function), lists district-filtered candidate sites from cr1bd_repairers (+ cr1bd_inspectionaddresses) via startswith(cr1bd_postcode,'<outward>'), then calls the MatchAddress op (custom connector cr1bd_addressmatch -> the cespkaddr-fn matcher) passing { caseLoc, principalCode, repairers, inspectionAddresses }. On a CONFIRMED match (decisionMode=confirmed_physical AND matched=true) it Patches cr1bd_evainspectionaddress + cr1bd_inspectiondecision on the Case; any other outcome (needsReviewerDecision / unknown / image_based / no district) leaves the Case untouched for staff review — GATED-SAFE, no destructive write without a confirmed physical match. Matching is advisory and never blocks intake (mirrors enrich.definition.json's advisory posture). [BUILD] flow. ACTIVATION [RESERVED-FOR-USER]: import the cr1bd_addressmatch custom connector + bind its connection (function key) to cespkaddr-fn-i7m4re, then turn CS Address Resolve ON. CAVEAT (the deep value, why this ships state=off): the parser emits a FULL address into cr1bd_evainspectionaddress and there is no cr1bd_loc district column yet, so this flow derives only a best-effort heuristic district (the second-to-last whitespace token) and feeds THAT to the matcher; a full free-text address has no parseable postcode (the matcher returns needsReviewerDecision, no write). Reliable district candidate ranking needs the parser inspection-location/district extraction (+ optional cr1bd_loc column) — the [RESERVED] Loc-source follow-up. A further refinement: the candidate ListRecords do not $expand the repairer->WorkProvider N:N, so principal-ranking is inert until that linkage is added. Claude never binds the connection or activates the flow.

Set_caseLoc.comment: caseLoc = the Case's current inspection-address text (full address today; a part-postcode Loc once the parser district-extraction follow-up lands). Passed verbatim to the matcher, which classifies locKind full|part|none itself.

Set_principalCode.comment: principalCode disambiguates district-shared yards; the parsed EVA work-provider value is the principal/EVA code. Empty is tolerated (the matcher ranks principal-linked candidates first but does not require one).

Set_outward.comment: Heuristic OUTWARD postcode code (district): a full UK postcode 'OUTWARD INWARD' sits at the END of an address (e.g. '... Chester, CH5 4AB' -> 'CH5'), so take the SECOND-TO-LAST whitespace token, upper-cased for the startswith filter. This is a best-effort heuristic over a free-text address; a RELIABLE district needs the parser inspection-location/district extraction (the [RESERVED] Loc-source follow-up). Tolerant: an address whose second-to-last token is not an outward simply yields no district candidates and the matcher returns needsReviewerDecision -> no write.

Set_hasOutward.comment: Only run the candidate ListRecords when we actually have a plausible outward code (>1 char). Avoids a startswith(cr1bd_postcode,'') that would pull the whole corpus.

List_repairers_in_district.comment: District-filtered Repairer candidates (startswith outward + active). NOT provider-scoped: the corpus directory is cross-provider by design (a repairer serves several providers, ADR-0001), and the matcher does principal ranking from principalCode in-Function. Documented exception in validate-flows.mjs (not a dedup-by-VRM read).

List_inspectionaddresses_in_district.comment: District-filtered confirmed-physical InspectionAddress reference rows (decisionmode=100000000 confirmed_physical). Suggested rows (decisionMode=unknown) are deliberately excluded — never auto-confirmed (schema note). The matcher accepts these CorpusRow shapes (cr1bd_addressline1..6 / cr1bd_postcode / cr1bd_name) directly.

Call_match_address.comment: MatchAddress always returns 200 with { decisionMode, inspectionAddress, matched, needsReviewerDecision, candidates[], locKind, district, warnings[] }. caseLoc is the DERIVED district (outward) when we have one (the matcher's parse_postcode then classifies it locKind=part and ranks district candidates); a full free-text address has no parseable postcode (parse_postcode is anchored -> locKind=none -> needsReviewerDecision), so reliable auto-resolve depends on the Loc-source follow-up. Stateless: the flow passed the district-filtered corpus rows in the body so the flow stays the SOLE Dataverse caller. The function key lives on the cr1bd_addressmatch connection, never here. [RESERVED-FOR-USER] to bind cr1bd_addressmatch to the live cespkaddr-fn-i7m4re.

If_confirmed_match.comment: GATED-SAFE write guard: Patch ONLY on an auto-resolved confirmed_physical match with a non-empty inspectionAddress. needsReviewerDecision / unknown / image_based / null-address ALL fall to the else (leave for review) — the flow never silently writes 'Image Based Assessment' (that needs an explicit reviewer decision + reason, schema note) and never overwrites on an ambiguous match.

Patch_inspection_address.comment: Write the resolved 6-line EVA inspection address (field 9) + mirror decisionMode=confirmed_physical (100000000) onto the Case. Staff-reviewable; never auto-final downstream.

Audit_address_resolved.comment: Audit action inspection_override (100000018) — the flow resolved the inspection location to a confirmed physical site. severity=info.

parameters.item/cr1bd_after: @concat('left for review; decisionMode=', coalesce(body('Call_match_address')?['decisionMode'], 'unknown'), '; locKind=', coalesce(body('Call_match_address')?['locKind'], 'none'), '; candidates=', string(length(coalesce(body('Call_match_address')?['candidates'], json('[]')))))

Audit_address_needs_review.comment: No confirmed auto-resolution — record an audit trail and leave the Case address untouched for a reviewer. No Dataverse write to the Case (gated-safe).

parameters.item/cr1bd_after: matcher/list failure - address matching skipped, intake not blocked, address left for review

Audit_address_resolve_failed.comment: Address matching is advisory and never blocks intake: on a matcher 5xx/timeout, audit (severity=warning) and continue — the Case address is left exactly as parsed. Depends on Call_match_address alone (single key): an AND with If_confirmed_match could never hold, because a failed matcher call leaves If_confirmed_match Skipped (not Failed/TimedOut). Mirrors enrich.definition.json's Audit_enrichment_failed.

Respond_to_parent.comment: Child-flow return action (required to be callable via Run-a-Child-Flow; mirrors enrich/parse Respond_to_parent). Echoes the match outcome. runAfter the decision branch on ALL outcomes so the child ALWAYS returns even when the matcher 5xxs (absorbed by Audit_address_resolve_failed).
